basic_info.full_name: Tokyo Electron Limited (東京エレクトロン株式会社)
basic_info.global_presence: Operations in Japan, US, Europe, Korea, Taiwan, China

abf_relevance.direct_relevance: High - Equipment supplier for IC substrate and ABF manufacturing processes
abf_relevance.substrate_manufacturing: Equipment used in ABF substrate production (etch, deposition, cleaning)
abf_relevance.advanced_packaging: Equipment for CoWoS, fan-out, and other advanced packaging technologies
abf_relevance.customer_base: Supplies to all major IC substrate manufacturers (AT&S, Ibiden, Unimicron, etc.)

market_data.revenue_trend: Strong growth driven by advanced logic and memory investments
market_data.competitive_position: Strong in etch and deposition, particularly for advanced nodes

strengths: Comprehensive product portfolio across deposition, etch, and cleaning
Strong relationships with leading foundries and IDMs
Technology leadership in ALD and advanced etch
weaknesses: Smaller market share vs Applied Materials and Lam Research
Heavy dependence on capital spending cycles
Limited exposure to EUV lithography (not in this segment)
threats: US/Japan export controls on China equipment sales
Applied Materials, Lam Research, KLA competition

data_completeness.basic_info: partial - limited by website access issues
data_completeness.products: partial - based on general knowledge, limited web verification
data_completeness.financials: not_available - could not access detailed financial data

notes: Tokyo Electron website had significant access issues - most pages returned 404 or cookie consent walls. Data supplemented from industry knowledge but marked with lower confidence. Recommend manual verification of financial data and recent developments.
